title: Sovereign AGI Action Registry Definition (M-02)
description: Schema defining the structure of the internal Action Registry, listing all available Capabilities (Target Components), the specific Action Verbs they support, and their full operational definitions (Input/Output schemas, effects, and cost metrics). This registry is the backbone for the Planner (M-03).

^[A-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]+$.description: Definitions for all actions available within a specific target component (Capability).

^[A-Z_]+$.description: Definition of a specific action verb or primitive operation.

status.description: Operational lifecycle status of the action.

side_effects.description: List of system state changes guaranteed or observed upon successful execution.

parameter_schema.title: Parameter Schema
parameter_schema.description: The JSON schema required for the 'parameters' object (M-01 Intent Input Schema).

intent_id.title: Intent ID
intent_id.description: Unique identifier for this specific intent iteration, linking to execution traces.

gating_conditions.title: Gating Conditions
gating_conditions.description: Predicates to filter incoming intent streams.

egress_schema.title: Egress Schema
egress_schema.description: The JSON schema defining the expected successful return structure (Action Result Output Schema).

result_id.title: Result ID
result_id.description: Unique identifier for this specific result iteration, linking to execution traces.

derived_data.title: Derived Data
derived_data.description: Computed or inferred values resulting from successful action execution.

cost_metric.description: Approximation of computational or resource complexity (essential for Planner M-03 resource optimization).

is_idempotent.description: If true, calling the action multiple times with the same input yields the same result without unintended state mutation.

is_query_only.description: Indicates if the action is read-only (i.e., NO_MUTATION should be in side_effects).

Predicate.title: Predicate
Predicate.description: Gating conditions expression, specifying constraints on input intent streams.

pred_type.title: Predicate Type
pred_type.description: Type of comparison (e.g., EQUALS, IN_RANGE, etc.).

value.title: Predicate Value
value.description: Value to compare against input intent attributes.

SchemaDefinition.title: Schema Definition
SchemaDefinition.description: Base schema structure used for both parameter_schema and egress_schema.

type.title: Schema Type
type.description: Type of data being described in the schema (e.g., string, integer, array, object).

properties.title: Schema Properties
properties.description: Object containing schema properties definitions (key-value pairs).

PropertyDefinition.title: Property Definition
PropertyDefinition.description: Definition of a property within a schema (e.g., key-value pair).

type.title: Property Type
type.description: Type of data the property represents (e.g., string, integer, array, object).

enum.title: Property Enum
enum.description: List of valid values for the property.

format.title: Property Format
format.description: Format of the property value (e.g., email, hostname, ip- address, uri).
